message:
fix(twitter): redact credentials in Debug output and short-circuit rate limits

- Add custom Debug impl for TwitterAuth and TwitterConfig that redacts
  all secret fields (API keys, tokens, secrets) to prevent accidental
  credential leakage in logs or error messages
- Change RateLimited errors from retryable to AttemptOutcome::Terminal
  in both request_with_retry and upload_with_retry, avoiding pointless
  retry loops when the API has already rate-limited the request

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
